seo.title: Building AI Chatbot with Claude Tool Use + Vex Guardrails
seo.description: Learn how to build ai chatbot with Claude Tool Use + Vex guardrails. Detect failures, prevent drift, and ensure reliability.

content.intro: Building AI chatbots with Claude Tool Use enables powerful conversational agents that leverage Anthropic's native tool calling and agentic capabilities for tasks like retrieval-augmented generation and intent classification. However, tool chains can cascade errors, parallel calls conflict, and extended reasoning may diverge from outputs, risking incoherent or unsafe responses. Vex provides essential guardrails to verify response accuracy, coherence, safety, PII protection, and hallucination detection in high-risk conversational architectures.

architectureOverview.heading: AI Chatbot Architecture with Claude Tool Use
architectureOverview.description:
The architecture centers on a conversational loop where user input triggers Claude's tool use for intent classification, RAG retrieval, and memory management. Claude processes messages with tools for querying vector stores, classifying intents, and maintaining conversation history, then generates responses. Multi-turn memory is handled via tool calls to persistent storage, ensuring context awareness across sessions.

Tool use enables parallel calls for efficiency—e.g., simultaneous intent detection and retrieval—but requires resolution logic to merge results. The agentic flow supports extended thinking via multiple tool iterations, with final output synthesis. Vex wraps these tool_use responses to catch failures early.

Safety and verification layers intercept tool calls and final responses, enforcing PII redaction, hallucination checks, and coherence validation before user delivery.

risks.name: Cascading Tool Failures
risks.description: Early tool errors (e.g., RAG retrieval timeout) propagate through agent chains, producing irrelevant or failed responses.
risks.mitigation: Wrap each messages.create() tool_use response with vex.verify() to isolate and flag failures immediately.

risks.name: Parallel Tool Conflicts
risks.description: Intent classification and retrieval tools return conflicting data (e.g., mismatched topics), leading to incoherent replies.
risks.mitigation: Use Vex to validate merged tool outputs against conversation context before final synthesis.

risks.name: Reasoning-Output Inconsistency
risks.description: Extended thinking traces justify one path, but final output contradicts it, causing hallucinated or unsafe responses.
risks.mitigation: Verify thinking chain alignment with output using Vex's hallucination detection on tool_use artifacts.

risks.name: PII Exposure in Memory
risks.description: Conversation memory tools store unredacted PII from user input, risking data leaks across turns.
risks.mitigation: Apply Vex PII protection filters to all tool inputs/outputs and memory persistence operations.

implementation.title: Basic Claude Tool Use Setup
implementation.description: Initialize Anthropic client and define core tools for intent classification and RAG retrieval.

implementation.title: Multi-Turn Message Loop
implementation.description: Handle conversation history with tool calls in a persistent memory pattern.
implementation.code:
async def chat_loop(messages):
    response = await client.messages.create(
        model="claude-3-5-sonnet-20240620",
        max_tokens=1024,
        messages=messages,
        tools=tools
    )
    return response

# Append to history
messages.append({"role": "user", "content": user_input})
messages.append({"role": "assistant", "content": response.content})

implementation.description: Define typed tools for intent and memory management in Node.js.

implementation.title: Parallel Tool Calls
implementation.description: Invoke multiple tools simultaneously for efficiency in intent + retrieval.

vexIntegration.title: Verify Tool Use Responses
vexIntegration.description: Wrap messages.create() with vex.verify() for accuracy and safety checks.

vexIntegration.title: Coherence + Hallucination Check
vexIntegration.description: Validate multi-turn coherence and detect reasoning inconsistencies.

vexIntegration.title: TypeScript Vex Wrapper
vexIntegration.description: Integrate Vex for parallel tool result resolution and PII scrubbing.
